title: 3D Pack
description: 3D Pack – Transform Minecraft with 3D Blocks and Mobs!
body:
![3D PAck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adfe8dc30d4ff84a6cc55e0b7b9111b5352927f4_0.webp)

**3D Pack – Transform Minecraft with 3D Blocks and Mobs!**

The **3D Pack** takes Minecraft immersion to a whole new level by transforming traditional blocks and mobs with stunning 3D models. This pack enhances essential blocks like the crafting table, furnace, chest, and many more, giving them a detailed and realistic 3D appearance. Now you can interact with your items and structures in a more engaging way!

But it doesn't stop at blocks – this pack also brings life to mobs. With **160 new skins**, every mob will have a unique look, adding variety to your world. From friendly animals to hostile creatures, each one is given a fresh, personalized texture.

Crops have also been upgraded, featuring a 3D design that makes farming more immersive.

**Key Features:**
- 3D blocks like the crafting table, furnace, chests, and more!
- **160 new skins** for mobs, ensuring visual diversity.
- 3D crops, bringing more realism to farming.
- A perfect blend of detailed visuals with optimized performance to keep the game running smoothly.
